api_types.name: AccountSpec
api_types.doc: AccountSpec defines the desired state of an Account object.

fields.name: APIKeySecret
fields.doc: A reference to the Secret containing the NGC API Key.

fields.name: ModelListConfig
fields.doc: A reference to the ConfigMap containing the list of NIM models that are allowed to be deployed.

fields.name: ValidationRefreshRate
fields.doc: Refresh Rate for validation, defaults to 24h

fields.name: NIMConfigRefreshRate
fields.doc: Refresh rate for models data, defaults to 24h

api_types.name: AccountStatus
api_types.doc: AccountStatus defines the observed state of an Account object.

fields.doc: A reference to the ConfigMap with data for NIM deployment.

fields.name: NIMPullSecret
fields.doc: A reference to the Secret for pulling NIM images.

fields.doc: The last time we validated successfully.

fields.doc: The last time we refresh the integration config successfully.

fields.doc: The last time we checked the Account, failed or successful.
